office_does: State representatives write and vote on state laws and budgets, oversee state government, and represent their legislative district.
race_blurb: Incumbent Adam Bernbaum faces Aiden I.R. Hamilton, Eric W. Pratt, and Ted Bowen; the approved dossiers contain no substantive platforms for the three challengers.

candidates.summary: Bernbaum is the incumbent District 24 representative with an accessible committee, voting, and bill-sponsorship record.
highlights: His legislative profile provides committee, voting, and sponsorship records [S2]

experience.basis: Incumbency supplies a state legislative record, though the dossier does not establish long tenure or major enacted accomplishments.

candidates.summary: Hamilton is a candidate for District 24 Position 1; the approved dossier establishes no substantive platform or prior elected record.
highlights: Official election records verify his candidacy [S1]

candidates.summary: Pratt is a candidate for District 24 Position 1; the approved dossier establishes no substantive platform or prior elected record.
highlights: Official election records verify his candidacy [S1]

candidates.summary: Bowen is a candidate for District 24 Position 1; the approved dossier establishes no substantive platform or prior elected record.
highlights: Official election records verify his candidacy [S1]
